title: Mailchimp vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Brevo email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which platform suits your business best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Brevo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Mailchimp and Brevo are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs. Mailchimp excels as a beginner-friendly solution with strong marketing automation, while Brevo offers a broader all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities. This guide helps you choose the right tool based on your business requirements and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email campaigns, automation, landing pages, A/B testing
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API

choose_a_if: You're a beginner with a small contact list and need an affordable entry point to email marketing
You prioritize ease of use with drag-and-drop editing and straightforward automation workflows
You want to build landing pages alongside your email campaigns from a single platform
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel marketing capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat integration
You require a CRM system and transactional email API for e-commerce or SaaS applications
You have a large contact database and want to maximize your free tier (up to 100,000 contacts)

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for beginners seeking simplicity and affordability, while Brevo wins for businesses needing comprehensive multi-channel marketing and CRM capabilities. Consider your specific requirements before deciding.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Brevo?
faq.a: Mailchimp has a lower entry price at $13/month for paid plans, compared to Brevo's $25/month. However, Brevo's free tier supports up to 100,000 contacts versus Mailchimp's 500, making it more cost-effective for growing businesses with larger contact lists.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email templates. Most migrations are straightforward, though you may need to recreate complex automation workflows. Plan your transition during a low-activity period to minimize disruption.
